description: A candid daytime operational photograph (no graphic design or added slogans). Two law-enforcement officers shake hands and smile in front of a silver SUV outside a brick building. The officer at left, seen from behind, wears a black raid jacket with large yellow 'POLICE ICE' lettering and 'SUPERVISOR' below; the smiling officer facing him wears olive tactical clothing with a 'POLICE' chest plate and a federal badge patch, plus a tactical vest and gloves. Another officer at right wears a cap and vest reading 'POLICE ICE'; bystander faces are blurred. The image shows ICE officers during an enforcement operation. The 'POLICE ICE'/'SUPERVISOR' wording is real jacket and vest marking within a candid photo, not designed meme text, so it is classified as not a designed graphic. The tweet concerns a South Texas man pleading guilty to smuggling 36 illegal aliens, quoting an ICE Houston official. Intent is to humanize/celebrate agents and accompany the smuggling-prosecution news.
notable_text: POLICE ICE; SUPERVISOR; POLICE (apparel markings, not designed text)
